mainEntity.name: Can AEO replace Google Ads for New York attorneys?
mainEntity.text: Can AEO replace Google Ads for New York attorneys?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, AEO complements Google Ads; it builds organic AI visibility while Ads provide immediate traffic for New York attorneys in competitive niches.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: AEO offers sustainable leads without CPC costs, but Ads cover short-tail urgency. Hybrid approach maximizes New York market share. Track attribution to justify budgets; pure AEO risks slow starts in high-stakes cases.[3]

name: AEO vs Google Ads for NY Attorneys
description: No, AEO complements Google Ads; it builds organic AI visibility while Ads provide immediate traffic for New York attorneys in competitive niches.[4]
